alttext.image_of_qrcode_to_scan: Billede af en QR-kode, der skal scannes
confirmation.cancel_creation: Ændringer vil gå tabt. Er du sikker?
confirmation.cancel_invitation: Are you sure you want to cancel this invitation?
confirmation.change_admin_role: This will have serious impacts on this user's permissions. Are you sure?
confirmation.clear_activity: Clear the entire activity log? This cannot be undone.
confirmation.delete_account: Er du helt sikker på, at du vil slette din konto?
confirmation.delete_group: Sikker på, at du vil slette den valgte gruppe?
confirmation.delete_note: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
confirmation.delete_tag: Delete tag "{name}"? It will be removed from all accounts.
confirmation.delete_twofaccount: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette denne konto?
confirmation.delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user? There is no going back.
confirmation.delete_vault: Delete vault "{name}"? All accounts in this vault will be lost.
confirmation.demote_own_account: You will no longer be an administrator. Really sure?
confirmation.disable_encryption: Are you sure you want to disable end-to-end encryption? Your encrypted accounts will become inaccessible.
confirmation.discard: Er du sikker på, at du vil kassere denne konto?
confirmation.discard_all: Er du sikker på du vil kassere alle konti?
confirmation.discard_duplicates: Er du sikker på, at du vil kassere alle dubletter?
confirmation.edit_own_account: This is your own account. Are you sure?
confirmation.logout: Er du sikker på at du vil logge af?
confirmation.purge_password_reset_reques: Are you sure you want to revoke the previous request?
confirmation.remove_biometric: Remove biometric unlock? You will need to enter your master password to unlock the vault.
confirmation.request_password_reset: Are you sure you want to reset this user's password?
confirmation.revoke_device: Er du sikker på, at du vil tilbagekalde denne enhed?
confirmation.revoke_session: Revoke this session? You will be logged out of that device.
confirmation.revoke_token: Are you sure you want to revoke this token?
confirmation.unshare_account: Are you sure you want to unshare this account from the team?
error.accepted_char_for_group_name: Please only use letters, numbers, dashes, underscores, spaces or single quotation marks
error.account_managed_by_external_provid: Konto administreres af en ekstern udbyder
error.auth_proxy_failed.legend: 2FA-Vault er konfigureret til at køre bag en godkendelsesproxy, men din proxy returnerer ikke den forventede header. Tjek din konfiguration og prøv igen.
error.backup_export_failed: Backup export failed. Please try again.
error.backup_import_failed: Backup import failed. Please check your file and try again.
error.backup_metadata_failed: Failed to read backup file. The file may be corrupted or invalid.
error.browser_does_not_support_webauthn: Din enhed understøtter ikke webauthn. Prøv igen senere ved hjælp af en mere moderne browser
error.cannot_create_otp_without_secret: Kan ikke oprette en OTP uden hemmelighed
error.cannot_decipher_secret: Hemmeligheden kan ikke dechifreres. Dette er hovedsageligt forårsaget af en forkert APP_KEY sat i . nv konfigurationsfil af 2FA-Vault eller en beskadiget data gemt i databasen.
error.cannot_decode_detected_qrcode: Kan ikke afkode detekteret QR-kode, prøv at beskære eller skærpe billedet
error.cannot_delete_the_only_admin: Kan ikke slette den eneste admin konto
error.cannot_demote_the_only_admin: Kan ikke degradere den eneste administratorkonto
error.cannot_detect_qrcode_in_image: Kan ikke registrere en QR-kode i billedet, prøv at beskære billedet
error.cannot_disable_encryption_with_acc: Cannot disable encryption while encrypted accounts exist. Decrypt or delete them first.
error.data_cannot_be_refreshed_from_serv: Data kan ikke opdateres fra server
error.data_of_qrcode_is_not_valid_URI: Dataene for denne QR-kode er ikke en gyldig OTP Auth URI. QR-koden indeholder:
error.encryption_not_enabled: Encryption must be enabled to create backups
error.encryption_setup_failed: Failed to setup encryption. Please try again.
error.error_during_data_fetching: 💀 Noget gik galt under hentning af data
error.error_during_decryption: Dekryptering mislykkedes, din database er stadig beskyttet. Dette skyldes primært et integritetsproblem af krypterede data for en eller flere konti.
error.error_during_encryption: Kryptering mislykkedes, din database forbliver ubeskyttet.
error.failed_icon_store_database_togglin: Migration af ikoner mislykkedes. Indstillingen er blevet gendannet til dens tidligere værdi.
error.failed_to_inject_content_script: Failed to inject the script to perform QR scan
error.failed_to_load_settings: Failed to load settings from the store
error.failed_to_retrieve_encryption_stor: Failed to retrieve encryption store data
error.failed_to_set_autolock_delay: Failed to set the auto-lock delay
error.field_is_required_and_valid_url: The field is required and must be a valid URL
error.invalid_or_unknown_token: Invalid or unknown personal access token
error.master_password_required_for_biome: Please enter your master password to enable biometric unlock.
error.no_entry_was_of_type_public_key: Ingen indgang var af typen 'public- key'
error.no_icon_for_this_variant: No icon available in this variant
error.no_match_in_the_icon_pack: No match in the icon pack
error.no_pwd_reset_for_this_user_type: Nulstilling af adgangskode ikke tilgængelig for denne bruger
error.no_qrcode_found: No valid QR code found in the visible area of the page
error.no_valid_otp: Ingen gyldig OTP-ressource i denne QR-kode
error.not_a_supported_otp_type: Dette OTP-format understøttes ikke i øjeblikket
error.push_subscription_failed: Failed to enable push notifications. Make sure you allow notifications when prompted.
error.reserved_name_please_choose_someth: Reserved name, please choose something else
error.security_error_check_rpid: Security error: Check your WEBAUTHN_ID env var
error.something_wrong_with_server: Noget er galt med din server
error.spaces_are_ignored: Uønskede mellemrum vil automatisk blive fjernet
error.sso_bad_provider_setup: Denne SSO-udbyder er ikke fuldt opsat i din .env-fil
error.sso_email_already_used: En brugerkonto med den samme e-mailadresse findes allerede, men den matcher ikke dit eksterne konto-id. Brug ikke SSO hvis du allerede er registreret på 2FA-Vault med denne e-mail.
error.too_many_ids: for mange id'er var inkluderet i query parameter, max 100 tilladt
error.twofauth_has_not_a_valid_domain: 2FA-Vault's domæne er ikke et gyldigt domæne
error.unauthorized.legend: Du har ikke rettigheder til at se denne ressource eller til at udføre denne handling
error.unsupported_migration: Data matcher ikke noget understøttet format
error.unsupported_with_reverseproxy: Ikke relevant ved brug af en auth proxy eller SSO
error.unsupported_with_sso_only: Denne godkendelsesmetode er kun for administratorer. Brugere skal logge ind med SSO.
error.user_deletion_failed: Sletning af brugerkonto mislykkedes, ingen data er blevet slettet
error.user_id_not_between_1_64: Bruger-ID var ikke mellem 1 og 64 tegn
error.wrong_current_password: Forkert nuværende adgangskode, intet er ændret
field.algorithm.help: Den algoritme, der bruges til at sikre dine sikkerhedskoder
field.allow_pat_in_sso_only.help: Let users create personal access tokens and use them to authenticate with third party application like the 2FA-Vault web extension
field.apiToken.help: The Personal Access Token (PAT) to authenticate the extension to the server. You can generate one from the Settings > OAuth page of your 2FA-Vault user account
field.auto_close_timeout.help: Automatically hide on-screen password after a timeout. This avoids unnecessary requests for fresh passwords if you forget to close the password view.
field.auto_lock.help: Log out the user automatically in case of inactivity. Has no effect when authentication is handled by a proxy and no custom logout url is specified.
field.auto_lock_extension.help: Lock the extension automatically to prevent illegitimate access to its data
field.auto_save_qrcoded_account.help: New accounts are automatically registered after scanning or uploading a QR code, no need to click a Save button
field.cache_management.help: Sometimes cache needs to be cleared, for instance after a change to environment variables or an update. You can do it from here.
field.check_for_update.help: Kontroller automatisk (én gang om ugen) og advarer når en ny udgivelse af 2FA-Vault er offentliggjort på Github
field.clear_search_on_copy.help: Empty the Search box right after a code has been copied to the clipboard
field.close_otp_on_copy.help: Klik på en genereret adgangskode for at kopiere den automatisk skjuler den fra skærmen
field.copy_otp_on_display.help: Automatically copy a generated password right after it appears on screen. Due to browsers limitations, only the first Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) password will be copied, not the rotating ones
field.counter.help_lock: It is risky to edit the counter as you can desynchronize the account with the verification server of the service. Use the lock icon to enable modification, but only if you know for you are doing
field.current_password.help: Udfyld din nuværende adgangskode for at bekræfte, at det er dig
field.defaultCaptureMode.help: Default input mode used when the Direct input option is On
field.default_group.help: The group to which the newly created accounts are associated
field.digits.help: Antal cifre i de genererede sikkerhedskoder
field.disable_all_security_devices.help: All your security devices will be revoked. Use this option if you have lost one or its security has been compromised.
field.disable_registration.help: Prevent new user registration. Unless overridden (see below), this affects SSO as well, so new users won't be able to sign in via SSO
field.display_mode.help: Vælg om du vil have konti vist som en liste eller som et gitter
field.enable_sso.help: Allow visitors to authenticate using an external ID via the Single Sign-On scheme
field.extCurrentPassword.help: The password currently used to unlock the extension
field.extNewPassword.help: The new password that will be used to lock this extension and encrypt sensitive data when needed
field.extPassword.help: The password that will be used to lock this extension and encrypt sensitive data when needed
field.get_official_icons.help: (Try to) Get the official icon of the 2FA issuer when adding an account
field.group.help: The group to which the account is to be assigned
field.health_endpoint.help: URL you can visit to check the health of this 2FA-Vault instance. This URL can be used to set up a Docker HEALTHCHECK or a Kubernetes HTTPS Liveness probe.
field.hostUrl.help: The web address of the 2FA-Vault instance where you signed up. For example: https://2FA-Vault.mysite.me
field.icon_collection.help: The icons collection to be queried at first when an official icon is required.
field.icon_pack.help: The icon pack to use when an official icon is required. Icon packs are made available by uploading pack directories to the 2FA-Vault server, ask your instance administrator for more.
field.icon_source.help: Set whether to fetch the icons from an online logo collection or a local icon pack. Changing the following icon settings will not refresh icons that have already been fetched.
field.icon_variant.help: Some icons are available in different flavors to best suit dark or light user interfaces. Set the one you want to look for first. The regular variant will automatically be fetched as a fallback.
field.icon_variant_strict_fetch.help: Narrow the fetch to the specified variant. If the variant is missing, 2FA-Vault will not try to fallback to the regular variant.
field.is_admin.help: Give administrator rights to the user. Administrators have permissions to manage the whole app, i.e. settings and other users, but cannot generate password for a 2FA they don't own.
field.keep_sso_registration_enabled.help: Allow new users to sign in for the first time via SSO whereas registration is disabled
field.language.help: Language used to translate the 2FA-Vault user interface. Named languages are complete, set the one of your choice to override your browser preference.
field.master_password.help: Minimum 8 characters. Use a strong, unique password.
field.name: Navn
field.notify_on_failed_login.help: Get an email each time an attempt to connect to your 2FA-Vault account fails
field.notify_on_new_auth_device.help: Get an email when a new device connects to your 2FA-Vault account for the first time
field.options.help: You can leave the following options blank if you don't know how to set them. The most commonly used values will be applied.
field.otp_generation.help: Indstil hvordan og hvornår One-Time Passwords (OTP)'er vises
field.otp_type: Choose the type of OTP to create
field.otp_type.help: Time-based OTP or HMAC-based OTP or Steam OTP
field.password_format.help: Change how the passwords are displayed by grouping digits to ease readability and memorization
field.period.help: Gyldighedsperioden for de genererede sikkerhedskoder i sekunder
field.push_notifications.help: Receive push notifications for security events directly in your browser
field.remember_active_group.help: Save the last group filter applied and restore it on your next visit
field.restrict_list.help: Emails in this list will be allowed to register. Separate addresses with a pipe ('{'|'}')
field.restrict_registration.help: Make registration only available to a limited range of email addresses. Both rules can be used simultaneously. This has no effect on registration via SSO.
field.restrict_rule.help: Emails matching this regular expression will be allowed to register
field.reveal_dotted_otp.help: Lad muligheden for midlertidigt at afsløre Dot-Obscured adgangskoder
field.show_accounts_icons.help: Show account icons in the main view
field.show_email_in_footer.help: Display the logged-in user's email in the footer instead of direct navigation links. The links are then available in a menu behind a click/tap on the email address.
field.show_next_otp.help: Preview the next password, i.e. the password that will replace the current password when it expires. Preferences set for the current OTP also apply to the next one (formatting, show as dot)
field.show_otp_as_dot.help: Replace generated password characters with *** to ensure confidentiality. Does not affect the copy/paste feature
field.sort_case_sensitive.help: When invoked, force the Sort function to sort accounts on a case-sensitive basis
field.store_icon_to_database.help: Uploaded icons are registered in the database in addition to the file system storage, which is then used only as a cache. This makes creating a 2FA-Vault backup much easier, as only the database has to be backed up.
field.store_icon_to_database.help_bis: But beware, this may has some drawbacks: The database size may increase significantly if the instance hosts many large icons. It may also affect the application performance because the file system is hit more often to ensure it is synchronised with the database.
field.test_email.help: Send a test email to control your instance's email configuration. It is important to have a working configuration, otherwise users will not be able to request a reset password.
field.theme.help: Force a specific theme or apply the theme defined in your system/browser preferences
field.timezone.help: The time zone applied to all dates and times displayed in the application
field.understand_data_loss: I understand that if I forget my master password, my encrypted data cannot be recovered
field.useDirectCapture.help: Choose whether you want to be prompted to choose an input mode among those available or if you want to directly use the default input mode
field.use_basic_qrcode_reader.help: Hvis du oplever problemer, når du optager QR-koder, kan du skifte til en mere basal, men mere pålidelig QR-kodelæser
field.use_encryption.help: Sensitive data, the 2FA secrets and emails, are stored encrypted in database. Be sure to backup the APP_KEY value of your .env file (or the whole file) as it serves as key encryption. There is no way to decypher encrypted data without this key.
field.use_sso_only.help: Make SSO the only available method to log in to 2FA-Vault. Password login and Webauthn are then disabled for regular users. Administrators are not affected by this restriction.
field.use_webauthn_only.help: Make WebAuthn the only authorized method to log into your 2FA-Vault account. This is the recommended setup to take advantage of the WebAuthn enhanced security.
field.use_webauthn_only.help_bis: In case of device lost, you will be able to recover your account by resetting this option and signing in using your email and password.
field.use_webauthn_only.help_ter: Attention! The Email & Password form remains available despite this option being enabled, but it will always return an 'Authentication failed' response.
field.vault_auto_lock.help: Automatically lock the vault and clear the encryption key from memory. Reloading, closing the tab, or reopening the browser always locks the vault again.
field.vault_auto_lock_timeout.help: How long the vault can stay unlocked without activity before it locks again.
field.view_default_group_on_copy.help: Always return to the default group when an OTP is copied
field.webhook_secret_help: Optional — used to generate HMAC signature
label.all_of_them_on_home.title: Show all passwords in the main view, without doing anything
label.alone_in_its_own_view.title: Click an account to get a password in a dedicated view
label.half.legend: Opdel cifre i to lige store grupper
label.push_permission_default: Push notifications have not been requested yet
label.push_permission_denied: Push notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
label.push_permission_granted: Push notifications are enabled in your browser
label.send_password_reset_link: Send link til nulstilling af adgangskode
link.see_how_to_enable_sso: Se hvordan man aktiverer en udbyder
link.sign_in_here: Du kan looge ind uden SSO
message.access_log_has_more_entries: The access log contains more entries.
message.account_bound_to_x_via_oauth: This account is bound to a {provider} account via OAuth
message.account_linked_to_sso_x_provider: You signed-in via SSO using your {provider} account. Your information cannot be changed here but on {provider}.
message.add_first_account: Vælg en metode og tilføj din første konto
message.admin_users_legend: Manage users registered on your instance or create new ones.
message.already_authenticated: Allerede autoriseret, log venligst ud først
message.auth_handled_by_proxy: Authentication handled by a reverse proxy, below settings are disabled.
message.auto_backup_help: Automatic backups run on the configured schedule and are sent to the active destination.
message.bind_twofauth_to_use_extension: The perfect companion to your 2FA-Vault web application
message.biometric_enrolled: Biometric unlock is enabled on this device.
message.biometric_enrollment_desc: Allow unlocking the vault with your fingerprint or Face ID instead of typing the master password.
message.biometric_password_help: Enter your master password once to enable biometric unlock.
message.delete_this_user_legend: The user account will be deleted as well as all its 2FA data.
message.delete_your_account_and_reset_al: Din brugerkonto vil blive slettet såvel som alle dine 2FA-data. Der er ingen vej tilbage.
message.deleting_group_does_not_delete_a: Sletning af en gruppe sletter ikke konti
message.deleting_twofauth_account_does_n: Sletning af din 2FA-Vault konto har ingen indvirkning på din eksterne SSO-konto.
message.detect_qrcode_in_page_legend: Start detection and select the code, I'll handle the rest.
message.disable_encryption_desc: Disabling encryption will remove E2EE protection from your account. Your existing encrypted accounts will need to be re-imported after disabling encryption.
message.do_not_set_password_or_encryptio: Do NOT enable Password protection or Encryption when you export data from a 2FA app otherwise 2FA-Vault will not be able to decipher them.
message.dont_have_account_yet: Har du ikke din konto endnu?
message.e2ee_benefit_1: Your OTP secrets are encrypted in your browser before being sent to the server
message.e2ee_benefit_2: Only you can decrypt your secrets with your master password
message.e2ee_benefit_3: The server NEVER sees your plaintext secrets or encryption keys
message.e2ee_description: End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) ensures that only you can read your OTP secrets. Even the server administrator cannot access your data.
message.e2ee_warning: If you forget your master password, your encrypted data CANNOT be recovered. Make sure to remember it.
message.e2ee_warning_setup: Important: If you forget your master password, your encrypted OTP secrets cannot be recovered. Consider writing it down in a safe place.
message.email_will_be_send_to_x: The email will be send to {email}
message.emergency_access_desc: Designate trusted contacts who can access your vault if you are inactive for a configured period.
message.enhance_security_using_webauthn: You can enhance the security of your 2FA-Vault account by enabling WebAuthn authentication.
message.ensure_you_open_mail_in_trusted_: Ensure you open the email on a device you fully own.
message.expected_format_for_direct_input: Expected: A list of otpauth URI, one by line
message.firefox_popup_restriction_info: Your browser (Firefox) requires a special preference to be enabled for the extension to automatically open when you capture a QR code from a webpage.
message.i_m_lucky_legend: The 'Try my luck' button tries to get a standard icon from the selected icon collection. The simpler the Service field value, the more likely you are to get the expected icon: Do not append any extension (like '.com'), use the exact name of the service, avoid special chars.
message.import_legend: 2FA-Vault kan importere data fra forskellige 2FA apps.
message.import_legend_afterpart: Brug eksportfunktionen for disse apps til at få en migrationsressource som en QR-kode eller en JSON-fil og derefter indlæse den her.
message.is_pat_still_valid: Is your personal access token still valid?
message.make_sure_copy_token: Make sure to copy your personal access token now. You won’t be able to see it again!
message.manage_account_at_proxy_level: Manage the account at proxy level.
message.manage_groups_legend: Du kan oprette grupper til at organisere dine konti på den måde, du ønsker. Alle konti forbliver synlige i pseudogruppen kaldet 'Alle', uanset hvilken gruppe de tilhører.
message.need_a_security_device_to_enable: Angiv mindst én enhed for at aktivere følgende indstillinger
message.need_to_import_qrcode_punchline: Need to import one of the visible QR codes of this page into 2FA-Vault?
message.no_features_enabled: No feature flags are currently enabled.
message.no_notes_yet: No notes yet. Create your first note.
message.no_tags_yet: No tags yet. Create one above to organise your accounts.
message.no_vaults_yet: No additional vaults. The default vault is your primary vault.
message.notes_locked: Unlock the vault to view and edit notes.
message.notifications.failed_login.conne: Here are the details of this connection attempt
message.notifications.failed_login.recom: If this was you, you can ignore this alert. If further attempts fail, you should contact the 2FA-Vault administrator to review security settings and take action against this attacker.
message.notifications.failed_login.resum: There has been a failed login attempt to your 2FA-Vault account.
message.notifications.new_device.connect: Here are the details of this connection
message.notifications.new_device.recomma: If this was you, you can ignore this alert. If you suspect any suspicious activity on your account, please change your password.
message.notifications.new_device.resume: A new device has just connected to your 2FA-Vault account.
message.notifications.new_device.subject: Connection to 2FA-Vault from a new device
message.notifications.reset_password.exp: This password reset link will expire in :count minutes.
message.notifications.reset_password.no_: If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
message.notifications.reset_password.rea: You are receiving this email because you requested a password reset for your 2FA-Vault account.
message.notifications.test_email_setting: You are receiving this email because you requested a test email to validate the email settings of your 2FA-Vault instance.
message.otpauth_export_format_desc: otpauth URI is the most common format used to exchange 2FA data, for example in the form of a QR code when you enable 2FA on a web site. Select this if you want to switch from 2FA-Vault.
message.otpauth_export_format_sub: Export data as a list of otpauth URIs
message.password_request_expired: A password reset request exists for this user but has expired, meaning that the user has not changed their password in time. This may be a request from the user themselves or from an administrator.
message.password_requested_on_t: A password reset request exists for this user (request sent at {datetime}), which means that the user has not yet changed their password but the link they received is still valid. This may be a request from the user themselves or from an administrator.
message.pending_emergency_requests: {n} pending emergency access request(s) need your approval.
message.possible_duplicate: En konto med nøjagtig samme data findes allerede
message.purpose_description: This web extension is an add-on to the 2FA-Vault web application. It lets you access the 2FA data of your 2FA-Vault user account and generate OTPs directly from your browser bar.
message.purpose_requirements: You must have a 2FA-Vault user account and bind it to the extension in order to use it. This is done by providing the 2FA-Vault server address and a Personal Access Token (PAT).
message.push_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser. Try using Chrome or Firefox.
message.recover_account_instructions: For at gendanne din konto, nulstiller 2FA-Vault nogle Webauthn indstillinger, så du vil være i stand til at logge ind ved hjælp af din e-mail og adgangskode.
message.recovery_punchline: 2FA-Vault will send you a recovery link to this email address. Click the link in the received email and follow the instructions.
message.registration_not_supported_visit: 2FA registraton from the extension is not supported yet. Visit your 2FA-Vault app to add your first 2FA.
message.resend_email_help: Use 'Resend email' to send a new password reset email to the user so he can set a new password. This will leave its current password as is and any previous request will be revoked.
message.reset_extension_description: The extension will be stripped of its current configuration and 2FA-Vault data. It will be available again for rebinding to a 2FA-Vault user account.
message.reset_extension_description_bis: Use this option if you forgot the extension password.
message.reset_password_help: Use 'Reset password' to force a password reset (this will set a temporary password) before sending a password reset email to the user so they can set a new password. Any previous request will be revoked.
message.reset_punchline: 2FA-Vault vil sende dig et link til nulstilling af adgangskode til denne adresse. Klik på linket i den modtagne e-mail for at angive en ny adgangskode.
message.reset_your_password_to_delete_yo: Hvis du altid har brugt SSO til at logge på, log ud og brug derefter funktionen nulstil adgangskode til at få en adgangskode, så du kan udfylde denne formular.
message.retry_or_reset_extension: You can try to refresh (maybe it was a temporary problem) or you can reset the extension and provide a new token.
message.revoking_a_device_is_permanent: Tilbagekaldelse af en enhed er permanent
message.security_devices_legend: Autentificeringsenheder, du kan bruge til at logge på 2FA-Vault, såsom sikkerhedstaster (dvs. Yubikey) eller smartphones med biometriske funktioner (dvs. Apple FaceId/TouchId)
message.settings_managed_by_administrato: Some settings are being managed by your administrator
message.sign_in_using_email_password: You can connect using the email address {email} and the password {password}
message.sign_in_using_sso: Vælg din SSO udbyder for at logge ind:
message.some_translation_are_missing: Some translations are missing using the browser preferred language?
message.sso_only_form_restricted_to_admi: Almindelige brugere skal logge ind med SSO. Andre metoder er kun for administratorer.
message.sso_only_x_settings_are_disabled: Authentication er begrænset til kun SSO, {auth_method} er deaktiveret
message.stream.need_grant_permission.cli: It is usually done by clicking on a slashed camera icon in or next to the browser's address bar
message.stream.need_grant_permission.rea: 2FA-Vault does not have permission to access your camera
message.stream.need_grant_permission.sol: You need to grant permission to use your device camera. If you already denied and your browser do not prompt you again, please refers to the browser documentation to find out how to grant permission.
message.stream.no_cam_on_device.solution: Maybe you forgot to plug in your webcam
message.stream.not_readable.solution: Er kameraet allerede i brug? Sørg for, at ingen anden app bruger dit kamera og prøv igen
HTTPS is required for live scan. If you run 2FA-Vault from your computer, do not use virtual host other than localhost
Stream API is not supported in this browser
Du skal bruge en moderne browser
message.submitted_data_parsed_now_accoun: Følgende 2FA-konti blev fundet i migrationsressourcen. Indtil videre er ingen af dem blevet tilføjet til 2FA-Vault.
message.supported_formats_for_qrcode_upl: Accepteret: jpg, jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg eller webp
message.this_is_not_soft_delete: This is not a soft delete, there is no going back.
message.throttle: For mange forkerte indtastninger. Prøv igen om {seconds} sekunder.
message.token_legend: Personal Access Tokens allow any app to authenticate to the 2FA-Vault API. You should specify the access token as a Bearer token in the authorization header of consumer apps requests.
message.token_remains_valid: This action does not revoke the personal access token in use.
message.twofauth_description: En web-app til at administrere dine to-faktor godkendelse (2FA) konti og generere deres sikkerhedskoder
message.twofauth_export_format_desc: You should prefer this option if you need to create a backup that can be restored. This format takes care of the icons.
message.twofauth_export_format_sub: Export data using the 2FA-Vault json schema
message.twofauth_export_format_url: The schema definition is described here:
message.twofauth_teaser: En web-app til at administrere dine to-faktor godkendelse (2FA) konti og generere deres sikkerhedskoder
message.twofauth_webext_teaser: A browser extension to retrieve 2FA security codes generated from your 2FA-Vault server.
message.unlock_description: The extension is locked to protect its data. Enter the extension password to access your 2FAs.
message.use_buttons_to_save_or_discard: Brug de tilgængelige knapper til permanent at gemme dem til din 2FA-samling eller kassere dem.
message.use_security_device_to_sign_in: Gør dig klar til at godkende ved hjælp af (en af) dine sikkerhedsenheder. Tilslut din nøgle i, fjern ansigtsmaske eller handsker, osv.
message.user_account_controlled_by_proxy: User account made available by an authentication proxy.
message.vault_health_duplicates_legend: Accounts sharing the same secret key generate identical OTPs.
message.vault_health_no_duplicates: No duplicate secrets found. Your vault is clean.
message.vault_health_no_unused: All accounts have been used recently.
message.vault_health_subtitle: Analyze your vault security and identify accounts that need attention.
message.vault_health_unused_legend: Accounts not used to generate an OTP in the past 90 days.
message.vault_health_weak_secrets_legend: Accounts with low-entropy secrets or weak algorithm settings.
message.vault_locked: Your vault is locked. Enter your master password to unlock it.
message.vault_locked_desc: The vault is currently locked. Your encryption key has been cleared from memory. Enter your master password to unlock access to your encrypted accounts.
message.vault_unlocked: Your vault is unlocked. Your encrypted accounts are accessible.
message.vault_unlocked_desc: The vault is currently unlocked and your encryption key is held in memory. You can lock the vault to clear the key from memory.
message.vaults_desc: Create separate vaults for personal, work, or client accounts. Each vault has its own master password.
message.warning_no_icon_pack: No icon pack found on the server.
message.webauthn_uses_trusted_devices: WebAuthn allows you to use trusted devices (like Yubikeys or smartphones with biometric capabilities) to sign in quickly and more securely.
message.workaround_available: This is a simple configuration change that takes less than a minute. We've prepared a step-by-step guide to help you enable this feature.
message.you_can_also_paste: You can also Paste your clipboard
message.you_need_an_account_to_go_furthe: You need an account to go further, please register yourself.
notification.autolock_triggered_punchlin: Auto-lås udført, du er blevet logget ud
notification.data_refreshed_to_reflect_s: Data er blevet opdateret, så de afspejler ændringer på serversiden
notification.emergency_access_requested: Access requested. The owner will be notified.
notification.test_email_sent: Test email sent, check your inbox
passwords.password: Adgangskoder skal være på mindst otte tegn og svare til gentagelsen.
passwords.sent: Vi har sendt dig en e-mail til at nulstille din adgangskode!
passwords.throttled: Vent venligst inden du prøver igen.
passwords.user: Vi kan ikke finde en bruger med den e-mailadresse.
pwa.accounts_cached: {n} accounts cached|{n} account cached|{n} accounts cached
pwa.add_to_home_screen: Add to your home screen for quick access
pwa.new_version_ready: A new version of 2FA-Vault is ready to install
settings.backup.encryption_required: End-to-End Encryption must be enabled to create encrypted backups.
settings.backup.export_description: Create an encrypted backup of all your 2FA accounts. The backup will be protected with a password of your choice.
settings.backup.import_description: Import accounts from a backup file. Supports .vault, 2FA-Vault, Aegis, and Bitwarden formats.
settings.backup.import_groups.help: Restore accounts to their original groups. Creates missing groups if needed.
settings.backup.no_backup_yet: You haven't created a backup yet. It is recommended to create regular backups.
settings.backup.password_help: This password will be used to encrypt/decrypt the backup file. You will need it to restore later.
settings.backup.replace_warning: This will permanently replace your existing accounts with the ones from the backup!
teams.enter_secret_to_share: Enter the TOTP/HOTP secret to share
teams.join_team_success: You have successfully joined the team!
teams.key_pair_not_ready: Your encryption key pair is not set up. You need it to share accounts securely.
teams.key_pair_setup_info: A unique key pair will be generated and stored in your browser. Your public key is shared with the server so others can encrypt data for you.
teams.name: Name
teams.no_shared_accounts: No accounts have been shared with this team yet.
teams.paste_totp_secret: Paste TOTP secret here (stays in your browser)
teams.secret_never_sent_to_server: The secret is encrypted in your browser. The server only receives the wrapped (encrypted) copy.

tooltip.pin_note: Pin this note to the top

tooltip.use_qrcode: Brug en QR-kode til at udfylde formularen automagisk
validation.IconPackExists: The icon pack cannot be found on the server.
validation.IsValidRegex: Attributfeltet skal være et gyldigt regex.
validation.after_or_equal: :attribute skal være en dato efter eller lig med :date.
validation.alpha_dash: :attribute må kun bestå af bogstaver, tal og bindestreger.
validation.alpha_num: :Attribute må kun bestå af bogstaver og tal.
validation.ascii: :attribute må kun indeholde single-byte alfanumeriske tegn og symboler.
validation.before_or_equal: :attribute skal være en dato før eller lig med :date.
validation.confirmed: :attribute er ikke det samme som bekræftelsesfeltet.
validation.custom.email.IsValidEmailList: Alle e-mails skal være gyldige og adskilt med et pipesymbol
validation.custom.email.exists: Ingen konto fundet med denne e-mail.
validation.custom.icon.image: Understøttet format er jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg eller webp.
validation.custom.ids.regex: ID'er skal være kommaseparerede, uden efterfølgende komma.
validation.custom.qrcode.image: Understøttet format er jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg eller webp.
validation.custom.secret.isBase32Encoded: Attributfeltet skal være en base32 kodet streng.
validation.custom.uri.regex: Attributfeltet er ikke en gyldig otpauth uri.
validation.date_equals: :attribute skal være en dato lig med :date.
validation.doesnt_end_with: De :attribute slutter muligvis ikke med en af ​​følgende: :values.
validation.doesnt_start_with: De :attribute starter muligvis ikke med en af ​​følgende: :values.
validation.ends_with: :attribute skal ende med et af følgende: :values.
validation.extensions: Feltet :attribute skal have en af ​​følgende udvidelser: :values.
validation.gte.file: :attribute skal være større end eller lig med :value kilobytes.
validation.gte.numeric: :attribute skal være større end eller lig med :value.
validation.gte.string: :attribute skal være mere end eller lig med :value tegn.
validation.hex_color: Feltet :attribute skal være en gyldig hexadecimal farve.
validation.ip: :Attribute skal være en gyldig IP adresse.
validation.ipv4: :Attribute skal være en gyldig IPv4 adresse.
validation.ipv6: :Attribute skal være en gyldig IPv6 adresse.
validation.json: :Attribute skal være en gyldig JSON streng.
validation.lte.array: :Attribute må ikke have mere end :value elementer.
validation.lte.file: :Attribute skal være mindre eller lig med :value kilobytes.
validation.lte.numeric: :Attribute skal være mindre eller lig med :value.
validation.lte.string: :Attribute skal være mindre eller lig med :value tegn.
validation.max.array: :Attribute må ikke indeholde mere end :max elementer.
validation.max.file: :Attribute må ikke være større end :max kilobytes.
validation.max.string: :Attribute må ikke være mere end :max tegn.
validation.max_digits: De :attribute må ikke have mere end :max cifre.
validation.mimes: :Attribute skal være en fil af typen: :values.
validation.mimetypes: :Attribute skal være en fil af typen: :values.
validation.missing_with: :Attribute-feltet skal mangle, når :values er til stede.
validation.missing_with_all: :Attribute-feltet skal mangle, når :values er til stede.
validation.onlyCustomOtpWithUri: uri-parameteren skal leveres alene eller kun i kombination med 'custom_otp'-parameteren
validation.password.mixed: De :attribute skal indeholde mindst et stort og et lille bogstav.
validation.password.uncompromised: De givne :attribute er dukket op i et datalæk. Vælg venligst en anden :attribute.
validation.present_if: Feltet :attribute skal være til stede, når :other er :value.
validation.present_unless: Feltet :attribute skal være til stede, medmindre :other er :value.
validation.present_with: :Attribute-feltet skal være til stede, når :values er til stede.
validation.present_with_all: :Attribute-feltet skal være til stede, når :values er til stede.
validation.required_unless: :Attribute er påkrævet med mindre :other findes i :values.
validation.required_without: :Attribute skal udfyldes når :values ikke er udfyldt.
validation.required_without_all: :Attribute skal udfyldes når ingen af :values er udfyldt.
validation.single: Når du bruger :attribut skal det være den eneste parameter
validation.starts_with: :Attribute skal starte med én af følgende: :values.
